title: Warehouse Supervisor
description:
As a Warehouse Supervisor, you will be responsible for managing day-to-day warehouse operations to ensure smooth receiving, storage, and distribution of goods. You will oversee inventory accuracy, enforce safety standards, and lead your team to deliver operational excellence. This position requires strong leadership, coordination, and attention to detail to support efficient warehouse operations and collaboration with other departments such as Inventory, Retail Operations, and Sales.


Job Responsibilities:

1. Warehouse Operations Management

  • Supervise daily warehouse activities including receiving, storing, picking, packing, and dispatching goods.
  • Monitor workflow and ensure operational efficiency, accuracy, and compliance with standard operating procedures.
  • Conduct daily warehouse inspections to ensure cleanliness, safety, and proper organization of storage areas.

2. Inventory & Documentation Control

  • Maintain accurate records of all warehouse transactions, including goods receipt, stock movement, and order fulfillment.
  • Ensure inventory levels are well managed, perform regular stock counts, and reconcile discrepancies promptly.
  • Prepare and maintain operational reports, documentation, and filing systems for audit and tracking purposes.

3. Safety, Compliance & Coordination

  • Enforce compliance with company policies, health and safety regulations, and housekeeping standards at all times.
  • Measure, track, and report key performance indicators (KPIs) and operational metrics to the Warehouse Manager on a daily basis.
  • Collaborate closely with purchasing, sales, and logistics teams to coordinate inventory planning and order management.
  • Perform other related duties as assigned to support warehouse and business operations.

4. People Management

  • Build a cohesive and motivated warehouse team by fostering teamwork, accountability, and a positive work culture.
  • Plan, schedule, and adjust manpower levels to meet daily operational needs effectively.
  • Train, coach, and mentor warehouse staff to ensure efficiency, accuracy, and adherence to operational standards.
  • Supervise day-to-day team performance and provide guidance to ensure productivity and service quality.

Requirement:

  • Minimum O Level or equivalent qualification in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
  • 3–5 years of experience in warehouse operations, with at least 2 years in a supervisory or team lead role.
  • Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
  • Proven leadership with the ability to motivate and develop a team.
  • Familiarity with warehouse management systems (WMS) and inventory control practices.
  • Excellent communication and coordination skills across departments.
  • Commitment to maintaining safety, accuracy, and operational excellence.

Benefits:

  • OT + Performance Bonus
  • Career Advancement
  • Health Insurance + Medical & Hospitalization Insurance + Life Insurance + Personnel Accident Insurance
  • Up to 14 days of Annual Leave
  • Sick Leave Benefits + Statutory Leave Benefits
  • Friendly Working + Teamwork Environment

*Want to know more about us? Please visit the link here: https://youtu.be/6cC0kesEVwQ

postedCompany.description:
MST Golf is the largest chain of golf specialty retailer in Malaysia and has more than 50 retail outlets in Malaysia, Singapore and Indonesia. With retail as its backbone, MST Golf’s businesses also covers wholesale business, golf related services including golf coaching, golf academies, event/tournament management, corporate merchandising, club fitting and operating driving ranges. MST Golf is the distributor and retail partner of many global golf brands.  


MST Golf also owns and operates MST Golf Arena, an indoor golf centre which merges entertainment, dining, and retail which was first introduced in 2022. The Group's unique 3-in-1 retail concept is a first-of-its-kind in Malaysia, combining the golf specialty retail store, golf academy and indoor golf facility all under one roof.


We intend to play an active role in expanding our operations, strengthening the industry, and driving the sustainability and growth of golf and its people to uphold our vision of serving our customers and members the best in everything golf.
postedCompany.name: MST GOLF (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
